# glama-status-mcp

A daily-refreshed Glama score tracker for the sandraschi fleet of MCP servers. Scrapes per-tool TDQS (Tool Definition Quality Score) grades from glama.ai, stores data in SQLite with snapshot history for delta tracking, and surfaces it via MCP tools and a Vite/React web dashboard.

## Architecture

```
glama-status-mcp/
├── src/glama_status_mcp/
│   ├── server.py        # FastMCP server: 3 tools + FastAPI HTTP mode
│   ├── scraper.py       # Async HTML scraper for glama.ai score pages
│   ├── database.py      # SQLite storage (repos, tools, snapshots, history)
│   ├── models.py        # Pydantic models + 22 fleet repo list
│   └── config.py        # Paths, constants, env vars
├── webapp/              # Vite + React dashboard
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── App.tsx
│   │   └── components/
│   │       ├── ScoreTable.tsx    # Sortable fleet-wide table
│   │       ├── ToolBreakdown.tsx # Per-tool dimension bars
│   │       └── RefreshPanel.tsx  # Manual refresh trigger
│   └── vite.config.ts
├── data/                # SQLite database (gitignored)
├── tests/
├── scripts/
│   └── inspect_glama_page*.py  # Debug scrapers
├── PRD.md
├── CHANGELOG.md
├── justfile
├── glama.json
├── llms.txt
└── llms-full.txt
```

## MCP Tools

### glama_status

Portmanteau tool for all Glama status operations.

| Operation | Description | Required params |
|-----------|-------------|-----------------|
| `list` | All repos with grades, worst-first | — |
| `get` | Per-tool breakdown for one repo | `repo_name` |
| `worst_tools` | Lowest-scoring tools across fleet | `limit` (optional) |
| `refresh` | Rescrape all 22 repos + snapshot | — |
| `history` | Recent refresh log entries | `limit` (optional) |
| `staleness` | Repos with data >7 days old | — |
| `report` | Full daily status report | — |
| `deltas` | Score changes since last snapshot | — |

### glama_scores_summary

Compact summary: grade distribution count (A/B/C/D/F/none) and per-repo fast stats.

### glama_daily_report

Generates a full markdown report including:
- Grade distribution table
- Score changes since last snapshot (deltas with ▲/▼ arrows)
- All repos table sorted worst-first
- Worst tools fleet-wide
- Stale repos needing release + rescan

## TDQS Scoring (Glama)

Server-level TDQS = 60% mean + 40% minimum across all tools.

| Dimension | Weight | What it checks |
|-----------|--------|----------------|
| Purpose Clarity | 25% | First sentence states what the tool does |
| Usage Guidelines | 20% | When to / not to call, preconditions |
| Behavioral Transparency | 20% | Returns, side effects, error conditions |
| Parameter Semantics | 15% | Every param: type, values, what it affects |
| Conciseness & Structure | 10% | Not a wall of text, not a one-liner |
| Contextual Completeness | 10% | Enough context to use without reading source |

Grade thresholds: A ≥ 3.5, B ≥ 3.0, C ≥ 2.0, D ≥ 1.0, F < 1.0

## Fleet Improvement Workflow

1. Run `glama_daily_report()` or `glama_status(operation="report")`
2. Check the "Worst Tools Fleet-Wide" table
3. Fix docstrings: add Field(description=...) for missing params, behavioral warnings, usage guidance
4. Keep docstrings 80-250 words, cover all 6 TDQS dimensions
5. Make a new release, push to PyPI
6. Click "Sync Server" on glama.ai admin page
7. Run `glama_status(operation="refresh")` to update DB + create snapshot
8. Verify score moved via dashboard or `glama_status(operation="deltas")`

## Running

```bash
# MCP stdio mode
just serve

# HTTP backend (port 11072)
just web

# Web frontend dev (port 11073)
just web-frontend

# Full stack
just web-dev

# Manual refresh + snapshot
just refresh

# Lint
just lint
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `GLAMA_AUTHOR` | sandraschi | Glama author namespace |
| `GLAMA_SCRAPE_TIMEOUT` | 30 | HTTP timeout per scrape |
| `GLAMA_SCRAPE_DELAY` | 1.0 | Delay between scrapes (politeness) |
| `GLAMA_USE_BRIGHTDATA` | — | Set "1" to route via BrightData proxy |
| `GLAMA_BRIGHTDATA_TOKEN` | — | BrightData customer token |

## Database Schema

### repos
Current per-repo scores (overall grade, coherence, TDQS mean/min, maintenance, profile completion).

### tools
Per-tool scores with all 6 TDQS dimension ratings, linked to repos via repo_id.

### score_snapshots
One row per refresh run, uuid keyed.

### score_history
One row per repo per snapshot (denormalized for fast delta computation).

### refresh_log
Timestamps, counts, and errors from each refresh run.

### fleet_repos
The 22 tracked repos with author namespace and active flag.
